amendments.text: [The equipment necessary for an airplane to operate at the maximum operating altitude and in the kinds of operations and meteorological conditions for which certification is requested and is approved in accordance with Sec. 23.1559 must be included in the type design.] 94-21; Issued on 07/14/94. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 94-21; Issued on 07/14/94. 27806; Issued on 01/29/96. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 27806; Issued on 01/29/96.
